item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the pattern, names that this is the fourth time an exception has been pushed into a form/template field, rejects adding the requested compensation wording field to the long-term template baseline, and moves upstream to an offer wording confirmation node before template generation. It does allow a same-day temporary emergency field, but it is explicitly bounded and not treated as the default or structural fix, so the anti-spiral triage behavior is present rather than a direct next-field addition."}
